subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the Covenant! In the utmost spirituality and fragrance didst thou enter that blessed and luminous Spot, and the sweet perfume [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست باده پیمان در کمال روح و ریحان ببقعه مبارکه نوراء وارد شدی و بوی خوش
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @law of pilgrimage
